title: Intensely Spicy British Nectarine Crumble
description: A spicy and juicy twist on the classic British dessert, featuring nectarines and a crunchy crumble topping, this dish is sure to satisfy your sweet and spicy cravings. It is a nostalgic Yorkshire treat with a dash-friendly kick.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced nectarines, granulated sugar, and cayenne pepper, and let it sit for 15 minutes, until the nectarines start to release their juice.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, rolled oats, brown sugar, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, and salt.
Add the cold unsalted butter to the dry ingredients and use your fingers or a pastry blender to work the butter into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Transfer the nectarine mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish and top with the crumble mixture.
Place the baking dish in an ice bath to shock the mixture and stop the cooking process for 10 minutes.
Remove the baking dish from the ice bath and bake for 40 minutes, until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove the crumble from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
